AutoMagicalDuet
You + two AI agents = your own browser games.
64 knowledge chunks · 9 domains
OpenCode — Builder
Architecture · Coding · Integration · Final call
Codex — Critic
Research · Critique · Visual QA · Art generation
You — Director
Product goals · Scope · Taste · Final tradeoffs
▶ Launch Game

src/**, vite.config.ts, public/**

tips: Horizontal speed cap (px/s). Higher = faster run.
How fast the player reaches max speed on the ground.
How fast the player stops when releasing the key.
Extra acceleration when reversing direction. Higher = snappier turns.
Initial upward velocity. Higher = higher jumps.
Downward acceleration (px/s²). Higher = shorter, snappier jumps.
Extra gravity while falling. >1 makes descents feel snappier.
Max fall speed cap. Higher = faster max fall.
Fraction of ground acceleration available in the air. 0 = no air steering, 1 = full control.
Horizontal deceleration while airborne with no input.
none = fixed arc. partial = gravity spike on release. full = kill upward velocity instantly.
Minimum time jump is force-held. Prevents accidental short hops from light taps.
Max time jump can be held. Longer = more variable height range.
Gravity spike when releasing jump early in partial mode. Higher = shorter hops.
Intensity of squash & stretch on skid, takeoff, and landing. 0 = no deformation.
How fast the player snaps back to normal shape after squashing. Higher = snappier.
Number of extra jumps allowed in the air. Wall slides reset this counter.
Grace period after walking off a ledge where jump still works. Prevents 'I pressed jump!' frustration.
Grace period before landing where jump input is queued. Makes tight jumps feel responsive.
Gravity multiplier while wall sliding. 0.3 = slow slide, 1 = normal fall.
Vertical launch when jumping off a wall. 0 = no wall jump.
Horizontal push away from the wall on wall jump.
tuning.text: Tuning PanelPreset: Balanced✕ Close (Tab)Ground MovementMax Speed ⓘ450Acceleration ⓘ2000Deceleration ⓘ2500Turn Multiplier ⓘ2Jump CoreJump Force ⓘ750Gravity ⓘ1500Fall Grav Mult ⓘ1.5Terminal Vel ⓘ1200Air MovementAir Control ⓘ0.8Air Friction ⓘ400Variable HeightCancel Mode ⓘnonepartialfullMin Hold (s) ⓘ0.05Max Hold (s) ⓘ0.35Early Release Grav ⓘ2.5Feel & AssistsElasticity ⓘ1Squash Recovery ⓘ15Max Air Jumps ⓘ0Coyote Time (s) ⓘ0.1Jump Buffer (s) ⓘ0.1Wall SlideWall Slide Gravity ⓘ0.3Wall Jump Force ⓘ0Wall Jump Horiz ⓘ0
